title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 18 July 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 18 July 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 18 July 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 19/07/2025
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remain largely subdued, with sentiment cautious and activity restricted
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-07-19_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-12-July-18-July-2025_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-07-19_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-12-July-18-July-2025_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
12 July - 18 July 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remain largely subdued, with sentiment cautious and activity restricted by a mix of seasonal and
structural factors. In India, limited market traction was observed early in the week, but momentum soon faded as buying interest softened. While inquiries
have been present, the continued lack of available vessels has prevented any notable movement.
